Writing the function definition... I'm running into a type mismatch where the assembly expects an s16 at offset 4, but the struct defines it as f32, so I need to change the struct definition to use two s16 fields instead and verify this won't break any other code that accesses this field.

For the other issue with the sth instruction at 0xC4, I can use the existing `grPura_GroundVars` union which has a u16 field at exactly that offset, so assigning to it should generate the right assembly.

Now I'm looking at the PPC assembly more carefully - the code loads a value into r0, stores it as a signed 16-bit value at offset 0xC4 from r4 (which points to the Ground struct), and then there's a separate sequence loading from grCs_804D6970 and doing a sign-extended load from offset 4.
